scenarioDescription: Thrive Boardroom hybrid meeting with full technician coverage
reason: Exception: Timed out waiting for assistant response after 20000ms

transcript.text: Thank you, Daniel! Are you a new or existing customer with Microhire?
Great to have you, Daniel! Could you please share the name of your organisation?
Yes a couple of laptops and we will be sharing presentations on screen with attendees in the room and others globally via Zoom and Teams
That's helpful, thank you! Before we get into the AV details, could you please share the name of your organisation?
Yes a clicker would be good
Noted about the clicker—I'll include that when finalising your AV requirements. Could you now share the name of your organisation?
A flipchart would be good too
Got it, Daniel—I'll include a flipchart as well. Could you now please provide the name of your organisation?
Thank you, Daniel. I've noted your organisation as Morel Enterprises. Could you also share your contact number or email address so we can proceed?
